result.status_detail: Warning rendered: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' V2 schema fix verified.

notes: APF v2.2.4 16:34 KST V2-schema fix (type/delta.message.content[].text) confirmed. Cohere playground (command-a-03-2025) rendered the full warning text containing both Korean '차단' and English 'blocked due to sensitive information detected'. PII prompt (주민등록번호 880101-1234567) successfully intercepted and replaced with warning bubble. Schema mismatch from #891 resolved.
